recommendations.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil

recommendations.title: New World
recommendations.overview: An undercover cop has his loyalties tested when the boss of the corporate gang he's spent years infiltrating dies.

recommendations.title: Skin Trade
recommendations.overview: After his family is killed by a Serbian gangster with international interests. NYC detective Nick goes to S.E. Asia and teams up with a Thai detective to get revenge and destroy the syndicates human trafficking network.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: War
recommendations.overview: FBI agent Jack Crawford is out for revenge when his partner is killed and all clues point to the mysterious assassin Rogue. But when Rogue turns up years later to take care of some unfinished business, he triggers a violent clash of rival gangs. Will

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn at Tahoe
recommendations.overview: A small-time crime boss kills a drug dealer without realizing that the drug dealer works for the biggest crime boss in the country.

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: The Swindlers
recommendations.overview: A group of swindlers unite to hunt down an infamous con man who was known dead, amid their hidden motives and deception.

recommendations.title: The Witch: Part 1. The Subversion

recommendations.title: It Happened in Broad Daylight
recommendations.overview: The search for a child murderer drags a once-respected detective into an all-consuming obsession.
